LAW AND MOTION 301, THE ISLAMIC SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. A R G U E D AND THE COURT GRANTED THE PETITION FOR INJUNCTION. DEFENDANT TO STAY 100 YARDS AWAY WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT HE MAY ENTER AND LEAVE NEW MOSQUE WHILE TAKING THE ROUTE THAT CARRIES HIM FURTHEST AWAY FROM THE EXISTING MOSQUE. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE.
